reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): Finding assumes c-kzg-4844 library has a bug causing it to return fewer than 128 cells. The c-kzg-4844 library is a trusted cryptographic dependency maintained by Ethereum Foundation and linked at compile time. The cell count is determined by library implementation, not by attacker-controlled input. Attack path relies solely on compromised/faulty trusted component (c-kzg-4844), outside security model.
